title: malaxis amplectens
intro: Malaxis amplectens, also known as the fetterbells orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Malaxis amplectens include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in poultices to treat various health issues.
